name: Evervault Card
summary: A premium card component featuring a distinctive rotating 3D vault-like effect with metallic sheen and dynamic lighting that creates an impression of security, value, and sophistication.
detailedDescription: The Evervault Card component creates a distinctive, premium card effect inspired by secure vaults and high-value containers. The signature effect features a rotating 3D element that resembles a vault door or secure mechanism, combined with metallic gradients and dynamic lighting that shifts as the effect rotates. This creates an immediate visual association with security, value, and trustworthiness. The card typically includes a subtle glow effect, metallic border treatments, and smooth animations that feel weighty and substantial. The rotating vault element can be continuous or triggered on hover, creating an engaging focal point that draws the eye. Visual polish includes careful attention to lighting angles, gradient transitions, and shadow behavior that reinforces the 3D illusion. Perfect for security-focused products, financial services, premium offerings, or any context where conveying trust, value, and protection is important. The effect creates a memorable visual signature that differentiates cards from standard treatments while communicating specific brand attributes around security and quality.
purpose: Create premium card effects evoking security and value
Communicate trust and protection through vault-inspired visuals
Differentiate cards with distinctive rotating 3D elements
Support financial, security, and premium brand positioning
Add sophisticated, high-value aesthetic to card presentations
behavior: Renders rotating 3D vault-like element on card surface
Applies metallic gradients with dynamic lighting shifts
Animates continuously or on hover with smooth motion
Creates 3D illusion through careful lighting and shadows
Includes subtle glow effects enhancing premium appearance
Returns to rest state smoothly when hover ends
visualCharacteristics: Rotating vault-inspired 3D element creating focal point
Metallic gradients with dynamic, shifting lighting
Sophisticated appearance suitable for financial contexts
Distinctive visual signature differentiating from standard cards
recommendations: Pairs well with testimonials, feature grids, and product highlight sections.
